data.name: MAMA
data.detailed_description:
In 1970, Soviet scientists began drilling deep into the Earth. By 1983, they reached 12,000 meters—
but at 14,000 meters, they uncovered something that was never meant to be found.

A strange portal lay buried beneath the surface. When a probe was sent in, hell itself answered. Monstrous creatures poured out, tearing through the facility and spreading beyond Soviet borders.

At first, the USSR tried to bury the truth. But as the world collapsed into chaos, they had no choice but to call for a global response.

Enter MAMA—an elite unit of highly trained female operatives, deployed to hunt the creatures, contain the outbreak, and uncover the portal’s true origin.

The world is on the brink. The hunt begins.

Dynamic RPG Battles

Engage deadly enemies using your equipment, items, and tactical choices in high-risk missions.

Choose Your Operative

Select from a lineup of irresistible married agents—each ready to infiltrate, strike, and survive the mission.

Adult CG Scenes

Unlock high-quality adult-only CG scenes through progression, encounters, and story events.

Explore Locations & Lore

Travel across global hotspots, uncover classified secrets, and learn what truly waits beyond the portal.

Wishlist now to secure your place in the mission—play when you’re ready.

data.short_description: In an alternative Cold War, the world’s most dangerous operatives are MAMA. As an elite milf agent, infiltrate, sabotage, fight, and outsmart enemies across covert missions worldwide. Dangerous—and replayable.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display
